title: WSET-AI-System Calibration Manifest
description: Schema for the calibration manifest that records all sources approved for Examiner Agent use. Every source in the Examiner Agent's retrieval corpus must have a corresponding validated entry in an instance of this manifest. The manifest is the human-reviewed audit trail that enforces the calibration gate defined in EXAMINER_CALIBRATION_RULES.md.

manifest_id.description: Unique identifier for this calibration manifest instance.

created_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this manifest was first created.

last_reviewed_date.description: ISO 8601 date of the most recent human calibration review.

next_review_due.description: ISO 8601 date by which the next scheduled review must be completed. Manifests not reviewed by this date must be treated as expired.

reviewed_by.description: Identifier or initials of the WSET-qualified reviewer who performed the last review. Must hold minimum WSET Level 3 Award in Wines.

reviewer_credentials.description: WSET qualifications held by the reviewer (e.g., 'WSET Level 3 with Distinction', 'WSET Diploma', 'DipWSET'). Used to validate reviewer authority for the materials being reviewed.

sources.description: Array of individual source entries. Each entry represents one approved source for Examiner Agent retrieval.

source_type.description: Classification of the source type. Only types listed here are permitted in the Examiner Agent corpus.

trust_tier.description: Trust tier per SEMANTIC_RETRIEVAL_ARCHITECTURE.md. Examiner Agent permits Tiers 0–3 only. Tier 0 = official marking authority; Tier 1 = official specification; Tier 2 = SAT framework; Tier 3 = validated benchmark answers.

title.description: Full official title of the source material.

edition_or_version.description: Edition, version, or year of the source (e.g., '2023 edition', 'June 2024 sitting', 'v4.1'). Critical for ensuring currency.

exam_session.description: For mark schemes tied to a specific exam session (e.g., 'June 2024'). Null for materials not session-specific.

file_reference.description: Internal file path or storage reference for the source document.

ip_clearance.description: Whether IP/legal clearance has been obtained to use this material in an AI system. Must be true before ingestion.

calibration_checks.description: Checklist of calibration gate requirements from EXAMINER_CALIBRATION_RULES.md §9.1.

source_authenticity_verified.description: Reviewer confirmed source is genuine WSET-issued material.

currency_confirmed.description: Reviewer confirmed source is from the current WSET Level 3 specification.

mark_scheme_completeness.description: For mark schemes: reviewer confirmed all marking points are present. Null for non-mark-scheme sources.

grade_descriptor_accuracy.description: For grade descriptor sources: reviewer confirmed P/M/D criteria match current official criteria. Null for other sources.

no_pedagogical_contamination.description: Reviewer confirmed source contains no enrichment, pedagogical explanations, or Tutor Agent-appropriate content that could bias Examiner Agent scoring.

sat_version_alignment.description: For SAT-related sources: reviewer confirmed content matches the current official WSET SAT version. Null for non-SAT sources.

legal_ip_compliance.description: Organisation has obtained rights to use this material in an AI system.

examiner_eligible.description: Whether this source is approved for the Examiner Agent retrieval corpus. Must be true for any source used in scoring operations.
All sources in the calibration manifest are by definition examiner_eligible: true.

tutor_eligible.description: Whether this source may also be used in the Tutor Agent corpus. Tier 0 mark schemes should typically be false here to prevent mark scheme language from reaching learners directly.

scoring_scope.description: The question types or assessment domains this source provides scoring authority for (e.g., ['written_short_answer', 'tasting_note']).

ingestion_status.description: Current ingestion status. Only 'approved' sources may be active in the Examiner Agent corpus.

approval_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this source was approved for ingestion.

expires.description: ISO 8601 expiry date. Null for perennial materials (textbooks, grade descriptors). Mandatory for session-specific materials (mark schemes, examiner reports).

revocation_reason.description: If ingestion_status is 'revoked', the reason for revocation. Null otherwise.

notes.description: Free-text notes from the calibration reviewer about this source.
